items.title: Dependency boundaries: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? More modules always mean lower coupling regardless of dependency direction.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Choose cohesive module boundaries and enforce dependency direction; file count alone does not reduce coupling.
